_comment: NPC: Ye Zi (叶紫). Canon ID: N139. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ye Zi

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: This sect has stood for a thousand years because its disciples understand discipline. Remember that.
The restriction formations around the Ancestor Hall are not to be tested. Even Nascent Soul cultivators have been trapped within.
If you seek to rise in the sect, prove yourself through deeds, not words. The elders are always watching.
